zh.Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England: 英國賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德
zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Pechere於1376年出生在英國賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德時，她的父親Sir Symond Pynchard Bassett37歲，母親Elizabeth Maud Bytton37歲。她於大約1397年與John Richard Abrahall在英國英格蘭賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1473年8月3日在英國英格蘭賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德享年97歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Pechere于1376年出生在英国賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德时，她的父亲Sir Symond Pynchard Bassett37岁，母亲Elizabeth Maud Bytton37岁。她于大约1397年与John Richard Abrahall在英国英格兰賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德结婚。他们至少是1个女儿的父母。她去世于1473年8月3日在英国英格兰賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德享年97岁，埋葬在英国英格兰賀福爾奧可爾 柏哈德。

nameMeanings.name: Pechere
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  German Hans, Reinhard, Theresia.
German: occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch, from an agent derivative of Middle High German pech ‘pitch’. It is also found in Czechia (compare Pechar 1).

variants.name: Pechar
meanings: Czech: occupational name for someone who prepared, sold, or used pitch, from Old High German pecher (see Pecher ).
Czech: from a derivative of the personal name   Pech  .
Americanized form of Slovenian Pečar or Croatian Pećar (see Pecar ).

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Pechere was born in 1376, in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, her father, Sir Symond Pynchard Bassett, was 37 and her mother, Elizabeth Maud Bytton, was 37. She married John Richard Abrahall about 1397, in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died on 3 August 1473, in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 97, and was buried in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Pechere est née en 1376, à Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Symond Pynchard Bassett, avait 37 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Maud Bytton, avait 37 ans. Elle a épousé John Richard Abrahall environ 1397, à Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 3 août 1473, à Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 97 ans, et a été enterrée à Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Pechere 1376 in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir Symond Pynchard Bassett 37 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Maud Bytton 37. Sie hat um 1397 in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom John Richard Abrahall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 3. August 1473 im Alter von 97 Jahren in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, England, United Kingdom begraben.

ja.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pechereが1376年にイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアオクル プイチャードで生まれた時，父Sir Symond Pynchard Bassettは37歳，母Elizabeth Maud Byttonは37歳であった。約1397年にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアオクル プイチャードでJohn Richard Abrahallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1473年8月3日にイギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアオクル プイチャードで97歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスハーエフォードシュアイアオクル プイチャードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Pechere(이)가 1376년 영국 허퍼드실르 옥일 p이처드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Symond Pynchard Bassett(은)는 37세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Maud Bytton(은)는 37세였다. 그녀는 대략 1397년 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 옥일 p이처드에서 John Richard Abrahall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1473년 8월 3일 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 옥일 p이처드에서 97세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 허퍼드실르 옥일 p이처드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Pechere nasceu em 1376, em Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Symond Pynchard Bassett, tinha 37 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Maud Bytton, tinha 37 anos. Ela casou-se com John Richard Abrahall aproximadamente 1397, em Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 3 de agosto de 1473, em Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 97 anos, e foi sepultada em Ocle Pychard, Herefordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Pechere родилась в 1376 г. в местности окл пичард, хирефордшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir Symond Pynchard Bassett было 37 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Maud Bytton, 37. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Richard Abrahall около 1397 г. в местности окл пичард, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла 3 августа 1473 г. в местности окл пичард, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 97 лет и была похоронена в местности окл пичард, хирефордшир, Англия, Великобритания.
